venues.name: Atlantide
venues.description: Main dining room — elegant bar-and-grill format with blue lobster, royal crab, steaks, and daily-changing contemporary menus. Open-seating for breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Kitchen
venues.description: Sea And Land Taste restaurant built into Silver Dawn from launch. Destination-driven menus rotating by voyage, featuring hyperlocal daily dishes tied to each port alongside a standing regional menu. Complimentary; dinner only, open seating.

venues.name: La Terrazza
venues.description: Italian restaurant with buffet breakfast and lunch including live cooking stations; evening à la carte with handmade pastas, antipasti, and seafood. Complimentary.

venues.name: The Grill
venues.description: Poolside casual dining by day. Evening Hot Rocks — guests cook prime meats and seafood on 400°C volcanic lava stones tableside. Reservations required evenings. Complimentary.

venues.name: Spaccanapoli
venues.description: Open-air poolside Neapolitan pizzeria with wood-fired pies and Italian snacks. Adjacent gelato bar. Open for lunch and dinner. Complimentary.

venues.name: Silver Note
venues.description: Late-night jazz supper club open from 8 pm. Tapas-style international small plates with live jazz and blues. Each guest orders several individual plates. Complimentary.

venues.name: Kaiseki
venues.description: Sushi and sashimi bar by day (complimentary). Evening omakase-style Japanese fine dining — miso black cod, wagyu beef, kushiyaki. Dinner supplement approximately $40 per person; reservations required.

venues.name: La Dame
venues.description: Silversea's signature French fine-dining restaurant (Relais & Châteaux) on Deck 8 with ocean views. White-glove service, classic haute cuisine. Dinner only; supplement approximately $60 per person.

venues.name: S.A.L.T. Lab / Chef's Table
venues.description: Culinary workshop on Deck 4 for cooking classes, tastings, and demonstrations with local expert chefs. Transforms into an intimate 11-course S.A.L.T. Chef's Table in the evenings. Surcharge applies for Chef's Table.

venues.name: Arts Café
venues.description: All-day café serving specialty coffees, pastries, sandwiches, and light bites. Complimentary throughout the day.

venues.name: In-Suite Dining
venues.description: Complimentary 24-hour in-suite dining. The Otium comfort-food menu is a notable feature — includes dishes like a foie gras burger available late-night. Full service from every suite.
